basic_details.short_information: The Broadcast Engineering Consultants India Limited (BECIL) has released the official Executive/Finance Notification 2026. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the BECIL Executive/Finance Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 18 to 32 years with a qualification of CA/CMA can apply through the offline mode before 30 July 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 32 years Age relaxation shall be applicable as per Government of India (GoI) guidelines.

selection_process: Scrutiny and shortlisting based on eligibility Forwarding shortlist to Client/Principal Employer Interview/Assessment/Skill Test/Evaluation Document Verification Final Selection by Client
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BECIL Executive/Finance Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.becil.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BECIL Executive/Finance Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the BECIL Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download BECIL Executive/Finance Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: BECIL Executive/Finance Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 32 years Age relaxation shall be applicable as per Government of India (GoI) guidelines.

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Application

content_sections.heading: BECIL Executive/Finance Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Scrutiny and shortlisting based on eligibility Forwarding shortlist to Client/Principal Employer Interview/Assessment/Skill Test/Evaluation Document Verification Final Selection by Client

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for BECIL Executive/Finance Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.becil.com. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BECIL Executive/Finance Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the BECIL Executive/Finance Recruitment 2026 is 30th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Executive/Finance post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a CA (Chartered Accountant) or CMA (Cost and Management Accountant) qualification to be eligible for the Executive/Finance post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the BECIL Executive/Finance position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Executive/Finance post is between 18 years and 32 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India guidelines.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Executive/Finance role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Executive/Finance position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 54,880/-.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Executive/Finance post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Executive/Finance post in the Broadcast Engineering Consultants India Limited (BECIL) Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for different categories?
faq.answer: The application fee is Nil for SC/ST/PwBD candidates. For all other categories, the fee is Rs. 295/-.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for BECIL Executive/Finance Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves scrutiny and shortlisting based on eligibility, followed by an interview/assessment, document verification, and final selection by the client.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of BECIL, which is www.becil.com.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates along with the application form.
